summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Geo Intelligence Module (Playback, Risk Map, Route Safety Engine). All required API endpoints and UI components are working correctly with proper Ukrainian localization.
passed_tests: GET /api/geo/risk?days=7 - Returns 49 risk zones with severity levels
POST /api/geo/route/check - Route safety check with Ukrainian messages
GET /api/geo/route/direction?lat=50.45&lng=30.52 - Safe direction analysis with 8 compass sectors
Tools tab navigation - Successfully switches to Інструменти tab
PlaybackControl component - Renders with proper controls and Ukrainian text
RiskHeatmap component - Shows risk zones with critical/high/medium/low/minimal levels
RouteSafety component - Working route safety analysis with Ukrainian localization
Ukrainian localization - All key UI text properly translated
Map view - GeoMap component displaying 50 events correctly
List view - Event list with proper distance calculations
Stats view - Statistical data visualization working
Radar mode - Toggle functionality and radius selection working
API health endpoints - All geo module endpoints responding correctly
Event type configuration - Virus(severity=3), Heavy_rain(severity=4) confirmed
AI Summary generation - Ukrainian text summary working
